Season 2 Episode 1: Creative Mission

A new season begins: arcade, Max, Will's visions, Hopper's secret, and a strange little creature. The lesson recycles Season 1 vocabulary while adding new story clues.

Realistic-style scene illustrations, short texts, speaking, translation builders, and a special connector board.
0 / 31 tasks completed

Mission briefing

Read each short scene aloud. Click words for Russian translation and audio. The recycled phrases connect this new episode to Season 1: protect a friend, investigate the case, follow a clue, hide from danger, the Upside Down, may become important.

Special task: connector board

Choose the best connector: because, so, that, after, before.

Grammar control

Present Simple, Past Simple, may, because / so, that, after / before.

Final speaking mission

Попробуй пересказать Season 2 Episode 1. Use the frames below.

At the beginning, the boys go to the arcade because ...В начале мальчики идут в игровой зал, потому что ...
At school, Max appears, and ...В школе появляется Макс, и ...
Will sees a strange vision after ...Уилл видит странное видение после того как ...
Hopper keeps a secret because ...Хоппер хранит секрет, потому что ...
At the end, Dustin finds ...В конце Дастин находит ...
